name: Trout with Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub each trout lightly with salt and pepper on both sides.
2. In a bowl, coat the fish with 1/4 cup flour.
3. Heat salad oil in a 12-inch skillet over medium heat.
4. Cook trout for 12-15 minutes, turning carefully once with a pancake turner until it flakes easily when tested with a fork.
5. Remove trout to a warm platter and keep warm.
6. In the drippings of the skillet, stir in 2 tablespoons flour until smooth.
7. Add milk and 1/4 teaspoon salt, stirring constantly.
8. Cook the mixture until it boils and thickens.
9. Stir in mustard; heat through.
10. Pour the sauce over the fish and sprinkle with chopped olives.
11. Garnish with lemon wedges.
Makes 4 servings (about 320 calories per serving).
